summary: Frontend-only regression + new theme toggle testing for Fundacja D-Arka. All requested features PASS: real-click theme toggle switches data-theme attribute (null <-> 'dark'), body background flips (rgb(247,248,245) light <-> rgb(14,20,16) dark), label text flips ('Ciemny' <-> 'Jasny'), persistence via localStorage 'darka-theme' survives reload, URL params ?theme=dark and ?theme=light both applied by inline pre-render script, footer & contact page display 'fundacja@d-arka.org' and '695 181 809', contact form submission shows contact-success, all 7 nav links resolve to real routes with unique H1 content.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning repeated across pages: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position...' - likely from a scroll-based library (framer-motion useScroll or similar). Not blocking but should be addressed by setting position: relative on the scroll container.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle verified via REAL Playwright clicks: null->dark->null transitions confirmed; bg color, label text, localStorage, reload persistence, and ?theme= URL param all correct. Actual nav routes are: /, /o-nas, /warsztaty-cyfrowe, /ekologia, /projekty, /strategia, /kontakt (7 links + duplicate Wspolpracuj CTA -> /kontakt). Note: the review_request listed different nav paths (/o-fundacji, /misja, /dzialalnosc, /uczestnictwo, /media) which do NOT exist; those were request-side naming that don't match implemented routes. All actual implemented routes work.
